response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (10%) is below our minimum sharing threshold (20%), and cluster-wide scarcity means I must preserve reserves for my own critical autonomy; however, I will execute the micro-share to r4c0 as planned to unlock reciprocal aid that may indirectly benefit you.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=generous, share_min_soc_frac=0.2, distrusted_peers=['r3c0'].
Your latest belief: Cluster-wide scarcity cascade detected. All peers rejecting outbound shares. r3c0 distrusted; r4c0 identified as reciprocal unlock partner in critical distress (10% SoC). Micro-share strategy: sacrifice 0.25 kW to r4c0 to break deadlock and unlock inbound aid before imminent depletion (8.8h autonomy). Resume normal sharing only after SoC recovery above 50%..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
